free_text: Large influence of incomplete fusion in 12C + 159Tb
Detailed discussion on the error analysis
12C beam is incident and target is irradiated in a
General Purpose Scattering Chamber at energies ~ 59,
70, 73, 85 and 88 MeV while beam current is
maintained at 25-30 nA. The Elab is about
Natural 159Tb targets (1.2-2.5 mg/cm2) followed by Al
Irradiated for ~8 to 10 h by ~25-30 nA current
The energy resolution is estimated as ~2.5 keV for
Overall errors excluding the uncertainty in
branching ratio, decay constant, etc. are estimated
- the error due to beam current
- uncertainty in the determination of geometry
- error in the thickness of the sample
error in the efficiency determination due
to the statistical fluctuations in counts (<2%)
